_comment: MCP servers the profile-and-optimize plugin can launch directly. The profile_and_optimize server is bundled at ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/server/. The other 2 (`grafana`, `github`) are external (operator-configured); tokens / URLs come from env vars so the manifest is safe to check in. Two further external servers used by some skills (`prometheus_mcp` for the observability-anchored skills, `zymtrace` for the zymtrace skills) are NOT declared here: unguarded ${VAR} placeholders show as red `Connection closed` in Cursor whenever the operator hasn't pre-exported the env var (Claude Code skips servers whose env vars are unset; Cursor does not). Add them to your own ~/.claude/settings.json or ~/.cursor/mcp.json if you have access — see `Operator-side optional MCPs` in plugins/profile-and-optimize/README.md.
